title: Replace 'connection initializing' message with account creation prompt

requirements.summary: Replace the 'Connection is still initializing' message in HubView.tsx with 'Make an account first to post the task in proxies' when users attempt to post without authentication
acceptanceCriteria: The text 'Connection is still initializing. Please wait a moment and try again.' no longer appears anywhere in the UI when a user attempts to post a task without an account.
The text 'Make an account first to post the task in proxies.' is displayed in its place under the same triggering conditions.
All other behavior (guard logic, toast/modal display, navigation) remains unchanged.

file_operations.description: Update the error message shown when a user attempts to post a task without being authenticated or connected. Replace the message 'Connection is still initializing. Please wait a moment and try again.' with 'Make an account first to post the task in proxies.' Locate the guard logic that checks authentication state before allowing task posting and update only the message string, preserving all existing conditional logic, toast notifications, and modal display behavior.
